title: Retro Bowl
description: The ultimate classic pixel-art American football management and arcade simulation game. Play, pass, score touchdowns, and lead your team to championship glory.

title: Subway Surfers
description: Run as fast as you can, dodge oncoming trains, and escape the grumpy inspector and his dog in this end-less runner classic.

title: Slope 2
description: Navigate a high-speed ball down steep, futuristic neon slopes. Dodge moving obstacles, collect rewards, and survive as long as you can!

title: Cookie Clicker
description: Bake millions of delicious cookies by clicking on a giant cookie, buying upgrades, hiring grandmas, and constructing portals to other dimensions!
